title: Ctenitopsis fuscipes
taxonomy: Ctenitopsis fuscipes is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. The Dryopteridaceae family is part of the larger class Polypodiopsida and division Pteridophyta. This classification places Ctenitopsis fuscipes within the kingdom Plantae. Further, it falls under the subkingdom Viridaeplantae and the phylum Tracheophyta. Ctenitopsis fuscipes is also commonly known as a member of the genus Ctenitopsis.
